name: cstudios-slovakia/ccrm
description: This package is the base for the Cstudios CRM system

extra.comment-ccrm-install-dir: Optional: relative path (from the consumer project root) to publish the built CRM into, e.g. "web" or "web/crm". When omitted, a conventional docroot (web/public/public_html/...) is auto-detected. Can also be overridden with the CCRM_INSTALL_DIR environment variable.
